title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the National 1[Institutes] of Design Act, 2014. (2) It shall come into force on such date 2 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint and different dates may be appointed for different provisions of this Act.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 3, ibid., for "Institute" (w.e.f. 13-1-2020). 2 16th September, 2014 vide notification No. S.O. 2393(E), dated 16th September, 2014, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
